description: A vertical memorial graphic. The background blends a U.S. flag on the left with a dark Border Patrol shoulder patch on the right, behind a large close-up portrait of a fair-haired man looking at the camera. Large white serif text near the bottom gives a name, David Chris Maland. Italic text below states that Border Patrol Agent Chris Maland was shot and killed during a traffic stop on Interstate 91 near Newport, Vermont, near the Canadian Border, and that he was escorting a female vehicle occupant when she broke away and shot him in the neck. A final line lists surviving family members.
notable_text: David Chris Maland; Border Patrol Agent Chris Maland was shot and killed during a traffic stop on Interstate 91 near Newport, Vermont, near the Canadian Border at 3:15 p.m.; He is survived by his fiancee, father, mother, stepmother, stepfather, and brother.
